creator: joe@thrallingpenguin.com
text:
Hi,

I may need additional information, as I just testing this port in poudriere and it compiled and functions just fine.

This was all performed with:

a. FreeBSD-12 fully patched (kernel and pkgs) to today's date.
b. FreeBSD-12 Jail, fully updated, inside of poudriere.
b. Ports tree holding the current 1.6.4 mosquitto.
c. Default build of mosquitto without any optional items enabled.

-Joe
